system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content:
Hi there! I just received my order (#W2378156) and I’d like to make a couple of exchanges. 

First, I ordered a mechanical keyboard, but I realized I’d prefer the same model with clicky switches instead. Also, if you have a version that’s clicky, full size, and has RGB backlighting, that would be perfect. But if there’s no clicky keyboard with RGB and full size, I’m okay with one without backlight as long as it’s clicky and full size.

Second, I got a smart thermostat, but it turns out the one I received is only compatible with Apple HomeKit. I need one that works with Google Home instead.

Can you help me with both exchanges? I want to make sure everything is sorted out in one go. My name is Yusuf Rossi and my zip code is 19122, if that helps. I don’t remember which email I used for the order, sorry!
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm here to help with your exchanges! Before I can proceed, I need to authenticate your identity. You provided your name (Yusuf Rossi) and zip code (19122), which is perfect.

Let me verify your account details first, and then I’ll review your order to find the exact items you received so I can suggest the best available options for your exchanges. 

One moment while I check your information.

Thank you! Please let me know if you need any other info from me to verify my account or the order. I want to make sure the exchange process goes smoothly, so just let me know what you need from my side.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for your patience and willingness to help! I’m currently having trouble verifying your account with the information provided. 

To proceed, could you please provide any of the following:
- The email address you might have used for your order (even a guess can help)
- The last four digits of the payment method used (credit card, PayPal, or gift card)
- The shipping address used for the order

Any of these details will help me authenticate your account and move forward with your exchange requests. Thank you!

Of course, I understand! I don’t remember the email, but I can give you the last four digits of the card I used—it’s 4812. The shipping address should be 1422 N 7th Street, Philadelphia, PA 19122.

Let me know if you need anything else to verify my account. I really appreciate your help and just want to make sure the exchange goes through without any issues.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm sorry, but I'm currently unable to verify your account using the information provided due to a technical issue. Because I can't authenticate your identity at this time, I won't be able to process your exchange request directly.

I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further and ensure your exchange is handled smoothly. Thank you for your patience!

arguments.summary: User Yusuf Rossi (zip 19122) wants to exchange two items from order #W2378156: a mechanical keyboard (for a clicky, full-size, possibly RGB model) and a smart thermostat (for a Google Home compatible version). User provided last 4 digits of card (4812) and shipping address (1422 N 7th Street, Philadelphia, PA 19122) but cannot recall email. System unable to authenticate user; needs human assistance.

Thank you for letting me know. I appreciate your help so far. I’ll reach out to your customer service team directly to get this sorted out. If there’s a direct number or email you recommend, please let me know.

Thanks again for your assistance!

Thank you for your understanding and patience, Yusuf. I’m unable to provide a direct phone number or email for customer service through this system, but you can usually find our support contact information on our official website under the “Contact Us” or “Customer Support” section.

If you have your order number and the details you provided here (name, zip code, last four digits of your card, and shipping address), please share those with the human agent—they’ll be able to assist you quickly.

If you need anything else or have questions in the future, feel free to reach out. Wishing you a smooth exchange process!
